basic_details.job_title: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 17 May 2026 on the official website of CUSAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks (or equivalent), NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D as per UGC regulations
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Contract basis): Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign University. Must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or similar test or awarded Ph.D as per UGC regulations 2009/2016 with all conditions fulfilled for pre-2009 candidates or top 500 world ranking foreign Ph.D. Desirable: Computer programming skills using SPSS/R/Python/SAS etc. and Ph.D.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUSAT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUSAT Assistant Professor (Contract basis) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application and receiving the hard copy of the application is 26 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹ 40,000 to ₹ 42,000 per month, with ₹ 42,000 for Ph.D. holders and ₹ 40,000 for others.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Assistant Professor (Contract basis) position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 950/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST candidates is ₹ 195/-.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online.

faq.question: Q10. Which department is recruiting for this post?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT).
